title: Esentiale
description: Modpack which aims to improve performance and gameplay experience
body:
**Esentiale** modpack aims to optimize and improve the Vanilla Minecraft experience. It combines optimizations with essential quality-of-life tweaks. Whether you are playing survival, designing builds in creative, or hopping on a server with friends, Esentiale provides the stability and features you need. The modpack is designed to be simple and also enhancing. Hence all added mods contribute to making the game better to play for everyone on any type of PC. All mods and resource packs used are carefully chosen to provide the best performance along with the best quality of life enhancements. This is also the very modpack I use for my daily gameplay so you can expect good from it. I will attempt to update and maintain the modpack as soon as mods are updated but expect there to be delays in full releases of the modpack. For any issues faced or suggestions, feel free to join [this](https://discord.gg/4quw7sUK4M) Discord server.
Other notes: Modpack version is labeled as A.B.(r/b)c with- - A- Year of minecraft version - B- Minecraft Version - C- Modpack Version r- Release, b- Beta
*All credits for specific mods and resource packs go to their respective authors.*
